title: hieracium bupleuroides subsp. calathodes
intro: Hieracium bupleuroides subsp. calathodes, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Hieracium bupleuroides subsp. calathodes include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. This plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
